title: ‘William Lobb’ – Old Fashion Shrub Rose – Purple - 4L Potted
features: An attractive rose plant with large sized double purple blooms they have a strong fragrance and a medium green foliage.
The blooms are once flowering during the June/July period.
This rose can grow to a height of up to approximately 180cm with a spread of up to 180cm once the rose is well established.
A lovely idea for a gift or as a gorgeous new addition to your garden.
Our potted roses are supplied in a 4ltr pot and a colour picture label and a rose care guide.
